'''ât-th-d-s''' ('''katathdesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brag|brag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brag|brag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-th-d-s
|-
! Lemma
| katathdesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitathdesoko|thitathdesoko]] || [[word:jitathdesoko|jitathdesoko]] || [[word:shitathdesoko|shitathdesoko]] || [[word:kitathdesoko|kitathdesoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
